creator: raimeetravel
caption: I’ve saved a crazy amount by not spending on these things… and that’s how I afford a lot of travel! This is how much some of my biggest trips have cost and how I was able to do it. I’ve been using @albertapp to keep track of my finances & help me identify more categories to cut out! #AlbertPartner

transcription.text: i do not spend money on these four things and it has allowed me to travel a lot more so i'm going to share some exact numbers and the trips i've been able to take because of the savings i've had and honestly i've been able to keep track of all this because of my personal financial assistant i use albert it basically does all of the thinking for me when it comes to my finances so when i tell you these numbers it's because i've been keeping track of them with albert the first one and i know this one isn't easy for everyone but i have not had a car payment in the last six or seven years i've saved over twenty thousand dollars not paying for a car and with that money i was able to go to borabora new zealand and japan next and this is a recent thing i stopped ordering things online i have not had a package delivered to me all year and already compared to last year i have saved two thousand dollars the next thing getting my nails done i paint them myself now and that three thousand dollars paid for my last trip i also stopped spending on entertainment subscriptions they add up faster than you think and i noticed all of these other subscriptions that i didn't even know that i was still subscribed to because albert showed me it has easily saved me three thousand dollars and i was able to go to both mexico and guatemala with that money keeping track of your finances and getting them together is what's going to allow you to travel more so go download albert it will help you do this in a very simple way and tell me where you're planning a trip to this year
